title: trochodendraceae
intro: The Trochodendraceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a group of plants that are closely related and share similar characteristics, and is often referred to as the family of the "trotters" or "trotter trees." The Trochodendraceae family includes two genera: Trochodendron and Tetracentron, which are native to Asia and are known for their unique flowers and fruit. These plants are often found in mountainous regions and are valued for their timber and medicinal properties.
